description: Godot Engine - Free and open source 2D and 3D game engine.

option.name: -e
tip: Start the editor instead of running the scene.

option.name: -p
tip: Start the project manager, even if a project is auto-detected.

option.name: --recovery-mode
tip: Start the editor in recovery mode, disabling features that can cause startup crashes.

option.name: --debug-server
tip: Start the editor debug server (e.g. tcp://127.0.0.1:6007).

option.name: --dap-port
tip: Use the specified port for the GDScript Debug Adapter Protocol.

option.name: --lsp-port
tip: Use the specified port for the GDScript Language Server Protocol.

option.name: --quit-after
tip: Quit after the given number of iterations. Set to 0 to disable.

option.name: --path
tip: Path to a project (directory must contain a project.godot file).

option.name: --scene
tip: Path or UID of a scene in the project that should be started.

option.name: --main-pack
tip: Path to a pack (.pck) file to load.

option.name: --audio-output-latency
tip: Override audio output latency in milliseconds (default is 15 ms).

option.name: --gpu-index
tip: Use a specific GPU (run with --verbose to get a list of available devices).

option.name: --text-driver
tip: Text driver (used for font rendering, bidirectional support and shaping).

option.name: --log-file
tip: Write output/error log to the specified path.

option.name: --write-movie
tip: Write a video to the specified path (usually .avi or .png).

option.name: --single-window
tip: Use a single window (no separate subwindows).

option.name: -b
tip: Breakpoint list as source::line comma-separated pairs.

option.name: --ignore-error-breaks
tip: If debugger is connected, prevents sending error breakpoints.

option.name: --profiling
tip: Enable profiling in the script debugger.

option.name: --gpu-profile
tip: Show a GPU profile of the tasks that took the most time during frame rendering.

option.name: --gpu-validation
tip: Enable graphics API validation layers for debugging.

option.name: --gpu-abort
tip: Abort on graphics API usage errors (usually validation layer errors).

option.name: --single-threaded-scene
tip: Force scene tree to run in single-threaded mode.

option.name: --debug-collisions
tip: Show collision shapes when running the scene.

option.name: --debug-paths
tip: Show path lines when running the scene.

option.name: --debug-navigation
tip: Show navigation polygons when running the scene.

option.name: --debug-avoidance
tip: Show navigation avoidance debug visuals when running the scene.

option.name: --debug-stringnames
tip: Print all StringName allocations to stdout when the engine quits.

option.name: --debug-canvas-item-redraw
tip: Display a rectangle each time a canvas item requests a redraw.

option.name: --max-fps
tip: Set a maximum number of frames per second. 0 = unlimited.

option.name: --frame-delay
tip: Simulate high CPU load (delay each frame by milliseconds).

option.name: --time-scale
tip: Force time scale (higher values are faster, 1.0 is normal speed).

option.name: --disable-render-loop
tip: Disable render loop so rendering only occurs when called explicitly from script.

option.name: --disable-crash-handler
tip: Disable crash handler when supported by the platform code.

option.name: --fixed-fps
tip: Force a fixed number of frames per second. Disables real-time synchronization.

option.name: --delta-smoothing
tip: Enable or disable frame delta smoothing.

option.name: --print-fps
tip: Print the frames per second to the stdout.

option.name: --editor-pseudolocalization
tip: Enable pseudolocalization for the editor and the project manager.

option.name: --main-loop
tip: Run a MainLoop specified by its global class name.

option.name: --check-only
tip: Only parse for errors and quit (use with --script).

option.name: --import
tip: Starts the editor, waits for any resources to be imported, and then quits.

option.name: --export-release
tip: Export the project in release mode using the given preset and output path.

option.name: --export-debug
tip: Export the project in debug mode using the given preset and output path.

option.name: --export-pack
tip: Export the project data only using the given preset and output path.

option.name: --export-patch
tip: Export pack with changed files only.

option.name: --patches
tip: List of patches to use with --export-patch. Comma-separated.

option.name: --convert-3to4
tip: Converts project from Godot 3.x to Godot 4.x.

option.name: --validate-conversion-3to4
tip: Shows what elements will be renamed when converting from Godot 3.x to 4.x.

option.name: --doctool
tip: Dump the engine API reference to the given path in XML format.

option.name: --no-docbase
tip: Disallow dumping the base types (used with --doctool).

option.name: --gdextension-docs
tip: Generate API reference from all GDExtensions loaded in the current project.

option.name: --gdscript-docs
tip: Generate API reference from inline documentation in GDScript files.

option.name: --build-solutions
tip: Build the scripting solutions (e.g. for C# projects). Implies --editor.

option.name: --dump-gdextension-interface
tip: Generate a GDExtension header file gdextension_interface.h.

option.name: --dump-gdextension-interface-json
tip: Generate a JSON dump of the GDExtension interface.

option.name: --dump-extension-api
tip: Generate a JSON dump of the Godot API for GDExtension bindings.

option.name: --dump-extension-api-with-docs
tip: Generate JSON dump of the Godot API including documentation.

option.name: --validate-extension-api
tip: Validate an extension API file for compatibility.

option.name: --benchmark
tip: Benchmark the run time and print it to console.

option.name: --benchmark-file
tip: Benchmark the run time and save it to a file in JSON format.

option.name: --no-header
tip: Do not print engine version and rendering driver/method header on startup.

common_option.name: --quiet
tip: Quiet mode, silences stdout messages. Errors are still displayed.
